The <script> containing the javascript '$( document ).ready('... is illegal and not allowed on the HL7 ci-build - need to put the script in a .js file in a trusted template if this IG is to build on the HL7 ci-build (if it is justified and needed)
An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The IG is not for the international realm, and it uses SNOMED CT, so it should fix the SCT edition in the expansion parameters
There are no valid display names found for the code http://loinc.org#29463-7 for language(s) 'fr-FR'. The display is 'Body weight' the default language display
Best Practice Recommendation: In general, all observations should have a performer

This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/mesures/StructureDefinition/mesures-fr-observation-body-weight|3.1.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice)
Reference to experimental CodeSystem http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/phd/CodeSystem/ContinuaDeviceIdentifiers|1.0.0
Best Practice Recommendation: In general, all observations should have a performer
Reference to experimental CodeSystem http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/phd/CodeSystem/ContinuaDeviceIdentifiers|1.0.0
Reference to experimental CodeSystem http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/phd/CodeSystem/ContinuaDeviceIdentifiers|1.0.0
Reference to experimental CodeSystem http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/phd/CodeSystem/ContinuaPHD|1.0.0
Reference to experimental CodeSystem http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/phd/CodeSystem/ASN1ToHL7|1.0.0

This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/mesures/StructureDefinition/mesures-fr-observation-bp|3.1.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice)
'low' is the default display; the code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ObservationInterpretation has no Display Names for the language fr-FR

None of the codings provided are in the value set 'JDV_J149-BodySiteBP-ENS' (https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J149-BodySiteBP-ENS/FHIR/JDV-J149-BodySiteBP-ENS|1.3.0), and a coding from this value set is required) (codes = https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R309-FMA/FHIR/TRE-R309-FMA#24890)
There are no valid display names found for the code http://loinc.org#8480-6 for language(s) 'fr-FR'. The display is 'Systolic blood pressure' the default language display
'Normal' is the default display; the code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ObservationInterpretation has no Display Names for the language fr-FR
There are no valid display names found for the code http://loinc.org#8462-4 for language(s) 'fr-FR'. The display is 'Diastolic blood pressure' the default language display
'low' is the default display; the code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ObservationInterpretation has no Display Names for the language fr-FR

This element does not match any known slice defined in the profile https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/mesures/StructureDefinition/mesures-fr-observation-bmi|3.1.0 (this may not be a problem, but you should check that it's not intended to match a slice)
'High' is the default display; the code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ObservationInterpretation has no Display Names for the language fr-FR
Best Practice Recommendation: In general, all observations should have a performer

Slicing cannot be evaluated: Could not match any discriminators ([code, system]) for slice Observation.code.coding:headCircumCode in profile https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/mesures/StructureDefinition/mesures-observation-head-circumference|3.1.0 - None of the 2 discriminators [code, system] have fixed value, binding or existence assertions

Observation.code.coding:headCircumCode: Found 0 match, but unable to check minimum required (Observation.code.coding) due to lack of slicing validation (from https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/mesures/StructureDefinition/mesures-observation-head-circumference|3.1.0)

HeadCircumCode: magic LOINC code 9843-4 required, but not found (from http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/headcircum|4.0.1). Note that other Observation codes are allowed in addition to this required magic code
Observation.value[x]:valueQuantity.unit: minimum required = 1, but only found 0 (from http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/headcircum|4.0.1)
Best Practice Recommendation: In general, all observations should have a performer

Slicing cannot be evaluated: Could not match any discriminators ([code, system]) for slice Observation.code.coding:painServerCode in profile https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/fhir/mesures/StructureDefinition/mesures-observation-pain-severity|3.1.0 - None of the 2 discriminators [code, system] have fixed value, binding or existence assertions

The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-maxValueSet|5.2.0 is deprecated
The discriminator type 'pattern' is deprecated in R5+. For future compatibility, you could consider using type=value with a pattern[x] instead (if this is not an inherited slicing)
The discriminator type 'pattern' is deprecated in R5+. For future compatibility, you could consider using type=value with a pattern[x] instead (if this is not an inherited slicing)
